rows.Description: Principal upstream inspiration for the PAI/Algorithm/ISA runtime pattern. Provides live infrastructure for AI assistance, memory, and instruction surfaces.
rows.Role in Runtime: Core machine-specific runtime flow and execution logic; steering and memory (fully external).

rows.Description: Open-source coding assistant environment and configuration surface with routing context and MCP support.
rows.Role in Runtime: Primary coding interface template; receives instruction templates and config; provides hooks with routing context.

rows.Description: Primary, versatile backend supporting 35 models and an agentic execution model.
rows.Role in Runtime: Primary backend for versatile tasks.

rows.Description: Local AST-backed code indexing, analysis, and structural search tool.
rows.Role in Runtime: Powers structural search, .agents routing rules, and runtime logic guidance.

rows.Description: Local voice notification pattern, sound pack mapping, and runtime signaling tool.
rows.Role in Runtime: Maps Algorithm phases to local sound packs; manages agent communication pings.

rows.Description: AI-powered code editor with agent and project rule guidance surfaces.
rows.Role in Runtime: Ships AGENTS.md and .cursor/rules guidance by default without Claude auth requirements.

rows.Description: High-performance JavaScript runtime and package manager.
rows.Role in Runtime: Used for building scripts and running the local Pulse compatibility server on localhost:31337.

rows.Description: Official CLI for interacting with GitHub repositories and publishing workflows.
rows.Role in Runtime: Used for verifying upstream links, repository creation, and optional publishing operations.

rows.Description: Fast line-oriented search tool for file and text patterns.
rows.Role in Runtime: Dependency for efficient text searching and literal search patterns alongside structural indexing.

rows.Description: Local instruction, hook, and image generation surfaces.
rows.Role in Runtime: Receives local instruction templates and provides image generation for assets when enabled.

rows.Description: Compatibility server for runtime communication and Pulse-based operations.
rows.Role in Runtime: Optional compatibility layer for runtime communication; skipped by default in standard install.

rows.Description: Routing and resolution system for skill-based agent capabilities.
rows.Role in Runtime: Handles skill-cluster routing and resolver logic for agent skills.

rows.Description: Runtime capability enhancements.
rows.Role in Runtime: Runtime core component.

rows.Description: Long-horizon coding specialist utilizing the K2.7 Code (262K) model.
rows.Role in Runtime: Long-horizon coding and time-critical simple tasks.

rows.Description: Fast iteration tool located at ~/.grok/bin/grok.
rows.Role in Runtime: Fast iteration and time-critical simple tasks.

rows.Description: API-based backend featuring Nemotron Ultra for deep reasoning.
rows.Role in Runtime: Deep reasoning tasks.

rows.Description: System for parallel task dispatching.
rows.Role in Runtime: Hook-based parallel execution.

rows.Description: Automatic task classification system.
rows.Role in Runtime: Automatic task classification.

rows.Description: Optional AI product surface from Anthropic.
rows.Role in Runtime: Receives local instruction templates only when enabled; optional compatibility target.

rows.Description: Anthropic AI model templates and model-specific advisor paths.
rows.Role in Runtime: Optional advisor path and template provider; skipped by default.

rows.Description: External workstream and task management system or configuration framework.
rows.Role in Runtime: External configuration via read-only config.json; remains fully external to Temperance.
